'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 96''' was the ninety-sixth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[October 29]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The [[Battle of Taanab/Legends|Battle of Taanab]]
*[[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]]
*[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]
*[[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]
*[[Outlander Club/Legends|Outlander Club]] patrons
*[[Bogg Tyrell/Legends|Bogg Tyrell]]
*[[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]]
*[[MD-series medical droid/Legends|MD-series medical droid]]
*[[:Category:Clothing|Garments and couture]]
*''[[Mon Remonda]]''
